creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Or maybe you just need to go back to the Philippines! 🥰🇵🇭

📍 Molocaboc Island in Sagay, Neg. Occ.

How to get there?
🚙 Drive to Vito Port in Sagay
🚣‍♀️ Molocaboc Island is 25 minutes away by pump boat from Vito Port
🎟️ We booked a tour package with Bascar Floating Cottage. Thank you so much @ronkerish for the recommendation!
💰Full day trip: 8000 PHP for a group of 10 includes boat transfer, seafood lunch in a floating cottage, snorkeling & swimming time, trip to the sand bar before heading back to the port. Price as of March 2023.

Who will you bring here? Tag your travel buddies!
